pipeline.description: Each pi monitor runs in a dedicated tmux session on a Mac mini in Bhutan. Monitors poll GitHub for new commits every 30 minutes and run E2E tests when changes are detected. Results are logged locally and pushed to Supabase after every cycle. This website reads from Supabase and auto-refreshes every 30 seconds.

steps.label: Pi Monitor
steps.detail: Runs in tmux on Mac mini, polls every 30 min

steps.label: GitHub API
steps.detail: Checks for new commits on watched repos

steps.label: Supabase
steps.detail: Status logged after every cycle via log-status.js

monitors.name: Bumicerts
monitors.purpose: E2E monitor for the Bumicerts impact certificate marketplace. Watches for new commits and runs full auth and UI flows including real OTP email sign-in via mail.tm.
test_types: Email OTP sign-in — new user (with handle creation)

monitors.name: Hyperboards
monitors.purpose: E2E monitor and ATProto record validator for Hyperboards. Runs a full UI flow to create boards, then validates every created ATProto record against the canonical hypercerts lexicon.
monitors.trigger: New commits on either watched repo
test_types: Full UI flow — create boards via playwright-cli
ATProto record validation against canonical lexicon
Schema integrity checks (uri, did, value fields)

monitors.name: Hyperindex
monitors.purpose: Health monitor for the Hyperindex GraphQL API — a Go ATProto AppView that indexes Hypersphere records. Runs a lightweight health check every 30 minutes and a full suite on new commits. Also validates that all indexed collections belong to expected Hypersphere namespaces.
monitors.trigger: Always (health check) + new commits on hypercerts-org/hyperindex (full suite)
test_types: Namespace validation — flags collections outside allowed domains (gainforest, hypercerts, hyperboards, certified, bumicerts, simocracy)
Full suite: schema integrity, search query, collectionTimeSeries

monitors.name: Certified
monitors.purpose: E2E monitor for Certified.app — the ATProto identity provider used across the Hypersphere ecosystem. Runs light health checks every 30 minutes and a full OTP sign-in UI flow daily and on new commits.
monitors.trigger: Always (health check) + new commits on hypercerts-org/certified-app (full suite) + daily UI flow
test_types: Full UI flow: OTP sign-in, profile, edit profile, apps, settings, sign out

monitors.name: Morning Digest
monitors.purpose: Daily morning summary sent to Karma via Telegram at 7:30am BTT. Reads all monitor logs, checks session health, triggers the Certified.app daily UI flow, and composes a concise health report.
test_types: Tails last 20 lines of all monitor logs
Checks all tmux sessions are running
